differential_diagnoses: Disseminated Fungal Infection (e.g., Blastomycosis or Histoplasmosis)
Infective Endocarditis with metastatic septic emboli
Metastatic malignancy with paraneoplastic or secondary infectious syndrome
next_steps: Perform diagnostic vitrectomy and aqueous humor aspiration for culture, cytology, and PCR
Perform CT-guided biopsy of pulmonary or hepatic lesion
Send blood, sputum, and tissue samples for specialized culture (e.g., Burkholderia-selective media)
Obtain infectious disease and ophthalmology consultations
Continue broad-spectrum antimicrobials until pathogen is isolated

differential_diagnoses: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (KLA syndrome) with endogenous endophthalmitis
Infective endocarditis with septic emboli (e.g., Staphylococcus aureus)
Metastatic malignancy with paraneoplastic syndrome or superinfection
next_steps: Perform diagnostic vitrectomy for culture and PCR
Obtain HbA1c and fasting blood glucose to assess for underlying diabetes mellitus
Perform CT-guided biopsy of the hepatic mass for culture, cytology, and histopathology
Perform transesophageal echocardiography to rule out endocarditis
Send blood and tissue specimens for specialized cultures (e.g., Ashdown's agar for B. pseudomallei)
